## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Lightsource and GrowthX to review content strategy progress and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Lightsource team needs to review and approve content ideas in Airtable; permissions issues resolved](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Infographic/image quality needs improvement; separate design review meeting to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver 3 blog posts next week, scaling to 5 the following week](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on generating pipeline, improving SEO rankings, and driving AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Review

  - [5 topic clusters developed based on company context, audience personas, competitor analysis, and SEO/LLM goals](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Lightsource team to review and approve content ideas in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [GrowthX using AI to draft titles, but will refine based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Goal: Deliver 3 blog posts next week, scaling to 5 the following week](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

### Content Refinement

  - [Lightsource provided feedback on specific topics (e.g., "Top 9 advantages of direct procurement" deemed too vague)](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a procurement glossary as high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Emphasis on making content more specific and valuable to target audience](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)

### Image and Infographic Quality

  - [Current infographics lack relevance to specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Lightsource shared examples of preferred infographic styles (e.g., process diagrams, visual representations of concepts)](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [GrowthX to discuss capabilities with their designer](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Separate meeting to be scheduled with Lightsource's lead designer for branding consistency](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

### Workflow and Permissions

  - [Airtable permission issues resolved; Lightsource team now able to approve/comment on content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [GrowthX to monitor approvals and begin content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lightsource team to review and approve content ideas in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Schedule separate meeting with Katya (GrowthX) and Hudson (Lightsource) to discuss design and branding](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [GrowthX to share refreshed content sample for voice and tone review](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin generating approved content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Follow-up sync early next week to ensure alignment and catch up on missed items](https://fathom.video/share/46E3K_mdxBMfnJrYnezLJFvXDrmyXtDb?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
